name: Spain
description: Almost always seen wearing a happy smile, Spain is a lush kingdom in southern Europe who prides himself on his warm climate, plentiful sunshine, and bountiful nature. His personality is bright and optimistic, and he can be described, more or less, as a cheerful country bumpkin. He claims that the source of his happiness is the sun that shines over his land constantly. Despite this, it is said that he is very, very scary when angry and that he sometimes comes off as insensitive and totally cluele

name: Sytry
description: Sitri is another candidate to succeed the throne in the demon world. He is the 12th of Solomon's 72 Pillars, who reigns over sixty armies of Hell. Special Skills: He has the ability to stir up human desire. He is especially able to make women show themselves naked, if he so desires. (Source: Taken from Isaac's Undercover Section part of the extras from volume 1)

name: Taichi Asamura
description: Yuta's biological father and Saki's father-in-law. After divorcing his ex-wife for various reasons, he remarried Akiko Ayase. He has a good relationship with Yuta and Saki.

name: Taiyou Amemiya
description: He is captain of the Arakumo Gakuen and is also a talented striker. He is a docile, gentle, kind-hearted, friendly and has all other good attributes a person has but he is rather reckless.

name: Tron
description: __Affiliation__ Village Bunnies, Demon Lord Kunai Hakuto, Satanists (former) __Species__ Cambion (half demon) A cute, melancholy-looking little girl dressed in black she and the image of a gothic lolita. Tron is very melancholic because of her stalking past that she suffered in the demonic kingdom and the human world, she once said that she had forgotten how to smile. name: Tsutomu Yamaguchi
description: Mikako's friend from early childhood who lives next door, also goes to Yazagaku. He has been in love with Mikako for a long time. He searches for his passion and a hobby, eventually becoming an apprentice to Mikako’s father and learning to be a photographer. He bears an eerie similarity to Ken Nakagawa, a character from "Tenshi Nanka Ja Nai”, who is also the lead singer of the popular band Manbou - often leading to several accounts of rabid fangirls and mistaken identity. name: Yoshi
description: Yoshi is one of the heroes of the Mushroom Kingdom and often helps Mario on his adventures. He is a member of the Yoshi race and has helped rescue his brethren from Bowser. First showing up in "Super Mario World" on the SNES, he has since appeared in dozens of titles in various media, including being a fighter in the "Super Smash Bros." series, having his own games (of which Yoshi's Crafted World is the most recent), and being a capture in Super Mario Odyssey as well as many other appearances

name: Yui Kanakura
description: **Height:** 167 cm She is a childhood friend of [Raku](https://anilist.co/character/48393/Raku-Ichijou) as well as his current homeroom teacher. Yui is also the head of the Chinese mafia group, Char Siu. Yui is also in possession of a fourth key but has confirmed to Raku that she is not the girl he had made a promise with ten years prior.

name: Yukinori Sawabe
description: A great pianist who appeared in front of Dai when he came to Tokyo. He started playing the piano at the age of four and is always thinking about jazz. He forms a trio with Dai and Tamada.

name: Yumiko Kimura
description: Housewife. She's easily influenced, but she likes serious men, so she's only ever had plain sex. Married to [Takayuki](https://anilist.co/character/308787). Note: The character she cosplays as later in the story is [Minamoto no Raikou](https://anilist.co/character/152370).

name: Yuugure
description: An android in the future who pressures Akira into marriage. She looks exactly like Towasa. She has a deep connection with Towasa, but keeps quiet about anything related to her, calling it "taboo."
